'''changïfyïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiberoscopy|fiberoscopy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiberoscopy|fiberoscopy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| changïfyïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chængïfyïfth || chængïfyïfj || chængïfyïfsh || chængïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || changïfngïfyïfth || changïfngïfyïfj || changïfngïfyïfsh || changïfngïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || changïfyïfth || changïfyïfj || changïfyïfsh || changïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || changïffyïffth || changïffyïffj || changïffyïffsh || changïffyïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || changïfyïfïf || changïfyïfïf || changïfyïfïf || changïfyïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || changïfyïfth || changïfyïfj || changïfyïfsh || changïfyïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || changïfyïfïfl || changïfyïfïfl || changïfyïfïfl || changïfyïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || changïfyïfïfïf || changïfyïfïfïf || changïfyïfïfïf || changïfyïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || changïfyïfïfn || changïfyïfïfn || changïfyïfïfn || changïfyïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || changïfyïfïforo || changïfyïfïforo || changïfyïfïforo || changïfyïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
